candidate: D64 exactness repeat for B=1 AR fallback-until-end after 4 consecutive zero-accept cycles
decision: do not promote AR fallback beyond opt-in D32 diagnostics
decision_reason: The D64 gate is not exact: fixed B=1 and fallback-until-end both fail on the translation prompt at generated token index 34 (AR token 220, MTP token 51). The fallback policy did trigger and emitted 55 fallback cycles, so this is not a simple threshold miss.

partial_completed_prompts.notes: The suite aborted on translation for both rows, so completed-prompt means are diagnostic only and not a speed claim.

follow_up: Audit target session state after B=1 zero-accept verify commits on the translation D64 trace before using AR fallback as a longer-horizon default.
